{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241018006319C092FFE9E0EC1354"}"},"total":15},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611441575208436542","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不赖，但是感觉主角脑子里只有利益"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772180176,"group_id":"7600775553578191896","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这是星空","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3wHsb8jAi4CTsg1pxR0pbQ6SiIBpo6BIdNpyEPgnDD6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9bd65e312f224c9596458b4f0e0b39a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877092&x-signature=wV%2F%2B5ALODETki4eE%2FWrajiCZdN0%3D","user_id":"1992771543764071","user_name":"hhhganhuol"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1992771543764071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600775553578191896","book_info":{"abstract":"在这个释放火球术都要献祭一根手指的世界，只有我，在拿“因果点”白嫖神迹。
这里是艾特利亚，一个“万物皆有价”的绝望世界。
穿越而来的林恩，看着手里那本能够“修改因果、白嫖代价”的破书，又看了看周围为了放个照明术都要嗑药吐血的土著们，陷入了沉思。
于是——
当他为了省下30点因果值，面无表情地用幻术吓退强敌时；
世人惊呼：“天哪！他不动声色就扭曲了现实，这得背负多大的诅咒！”
当他为了建立势力，随手治好了那个因魔力反噬而每晚痛不欲生的女剑圣时；
剑圣落泪：“大人竟然用自己的生命力填补了我的灵魂……此生此世，我唯您是才！”
当他为了对抗古神，不得不花费巨资，一剑钉死天降的伪天使时；
教廷战栗：“弑神的代价足以让半神陨落，他为什么还能若无其事地站着？他……究竟是什么怪物？！”
……
多年后，当林恩坐在【黄昏座主】的至高神位上，看着匍匐在脚下的半神、古龙与帝国皇帝，他无奈地叹了口气。
“我再说最后一遍。”
“我真没想拯救世界，我只是想把刚才装逼花掉的那个亿……给赚回来。”
